title: sannantha collina
intro: Sannantha collina, also known as the Coastal Sannantha, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae, native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The leaves of Sannantha collina have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, due to its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Traditionally, the leaves of this plant are used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be prepared by drying and powdering the leaves.
